title: Fixing Broken HTML Anchor Tags with Invalid Target Attributes

statement.markdown: You are given a string representing an HTML anchor tag. Your task is to validate whether the 'target' attribute is valid. The valid values for the 'target' attribute are '_blank', '_self', '_parent', and '_top'. Return `true` if the 'target' attribute is valid, and `false` otherwise. Note that the anchor tag may contain other attributes, and it's not a requirement to validate them.
statement.inputFormat: A string representing an HTML anchor tag, e.g., ''
statement.outputFormat: A boolean value indicating whether the 'target' attribute is valid
statement.notes: The input string may contain additional attributes, but you only need to focus on the 'target' attribute.

constraints.description: The length of the input string
